details.test: Task 1: Find and copy Shipping Policy Template share URL
Task 2: Select fastest US carrier option under $10 for <2kg and open setup
Task 3: Start Shopify integration video tutorial under 10 minutes
Task 4: Submit downgrade support request from Pro to Basic with $30/month budget
Task 5: Enable auto-cancel for unfulfilled orders after 7 days
Task 6: Create canned response from defective item return template
Task 7: Report SYNC_409 product feed incident with medium severity
Task 8: Set payout schedule to weekly with $100 minimum threshold
